user.title: SolArk Cloud — System Configuration
user.description: Enter your SolarkCloud credentials and system specifications. These are used to set gauge thresholds on the dashboard.

data.inverter_rating: Single inverter rating (watts, e.g. 12000 for Sol-Ark 12K)
data.max_pv_power: Total max PV array output (watts). Auto: panels × watts/panel
data.battery_kwh: Capacity per battery (kWh, e.g. 18.5 for Fortress eVault MAX)
data.battery_max_power: Max charge/discharge per battery (watts, e.g. 8640 for eVault MAX)
data.timezone: Timezone (e.g. America/Detroit). Blank = use HA timezone.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SolarkCloud. Please try again later.
